title: Big Medical Image Preprocessing With Apache Beam | A Step-by-Step Guide
summary: This article will walk you through how to process large medical images efficiently using Apache Beam — and we’ll use a specific example to explore the following: - How to approach using huge images in ML/AI - Different libraries for dealing with said images - How to create efficient parallel processing pipelines Ready for some serious knowledge-sharing? Artykuł Big Medical Image Preprocessing With Apache Beam | A Step-by-Step Guide pochodzi z serwisu DLabs.AI .
author: Katarzyna Rojewska
